title: Charmed Life - Chapter 23 (Fragment 1)
text:
Chrestomanci Castle

C HRESTOMANCI C ASTLE

AS A NINE-LIFED enchanter with the most powerful job in the related worlds, it is only right and proper that Chrestomanci resides in a place that is as grand and imposing as his title — and Chrestomanci Castle is most certainly grand and imposing. If driving from the local railway station, you first glimpse this marvellous building at the top of a hill as you approach along the narrow, winding road. You sweep through massive gates into an avenue of dark green cedars and elm trees, before scrunching to a halt on the gravel outside one of the castle’s many entrances.

Nestled in the heart of the English countryside, Chrestomanci Castle’s history stretches back beyond most people’s memory. Parts of it are very old; it has been extended and expanded over the years so that its appearance is unlike any other castle you have seen before. Part of it is gray and turreted and every bit the medieval-style fortress you might imagine; yet turn a corner and you will come across a bright new part, more like a palace or a mansion, with a spread of windows and a flag fluttering from the roof. (Architecturally, Michael Saunders would probably tell you it is a very interesting mix indeed — but it’s probably not wise to ask him about it unless you have two or three hours to spare.)

The interior of Chrestomanci Castle is as impressive as the outside. If you enter through the main front doors, you will find yourself in an airy entrance hall with a pentagram installed in the tiled floor. Topping this lofty space is a domed glass roof, from which hangs the most magnificent sight in the entrance hall, an enormous crystal chandelier. A majestic pink staircase curls up to the next level. Several doorways topped with statues lead off from the hall; the door to the most important room is topped with a clock as well as a statue.

vocabulary.definition: Spacious and well lit; having a lot of fresh air.
vocabulary.example: ...you will find yourself in an airy entrance hall...

vocabulary.definition: In a way that relates to the design and style of buildings.
vocabulary.example: Architecturally, Michael Saunders would probably tell you it is a very interesting mix...

vocabulary.definition: A type of large coniferous tree known for its fragrant wood and durable timber.
vocabulary.example: You sweep through massive gates into an avenue of dark green cedars and elm trees.

vocabulary.definition: A decorative hanging light fixture with branches for several light bulbs or candles.
vocabulary.example: ...an enormous crystal chandelier.

vocabulary.definition: Having a rounded vault forming the roof of a building or structure.
vocabulary.example: Topping this lofty space is a domed glass roof...

vocabulary.definition: A person who uses magic or sorcery.
vocabulary.example: As a nine-lifed enchanter with the most powerful job in the related worlds...

vocabulary.definition: Made larger or more extensive; increased in size.
vocabulary.example: It has been extended and expanded over the years...

vocabulary.definition: Made longer or larger in area or scope.
vocabulary.example: It has been extended and expanded over the years...

vocabulary.definition: A military stronghold, especially a large fortified place.
vocabulary.example: ...medieval-style fortress you might imagine;

vocabulary.definition: A brief or quick view or look at something.
vocabulary.example: You first glimpse this marvellous building at the top of a hill...

vocabulary.definition: Small stones, often used for paths or driveways.
vocabulary.example: Before scrunching to a halt on the gravel outside one of the castle’s many entrances.

vocabulary.definition: Impressive in appearance or manner, often in a way that causes admiration or awe.
vocabulary.example: Chrestomanci Castle is most certainly grand and imposing.

vocabulary.definition: The inside part of something, especially a building.
vocabulary.example: The interior of Chrestomanci Castle is as impressive as the outside.

vocabulary.definition: Of imposing height; elevated in character or spirit.
vocabulary.example: Topping this lofty space is a domed glass roof...

vocabulary.definition: Having or showing impressive beauty or dignity.
vocabulary.example: A majestic pink staircase curls up to the next level.

vocabulary.definition: A large, impressive house.
vocabulary.example: ...more like a palace or a mansion...

vocabulary.definition: Causing great wonder; extraordinarily good or great.
vocabulary.example: You first glimpse this marvellous building at the top of a hill...

vocabulary.definition: Relating to the Middle Ages, a period in European history from about 500 to 1500 AD.
vocabulary.example: ...every bit the medieval-style fortress you might imagine...

vocabulary.definition: To settle or lie comfortably within or against something.
vocabulary.example: Nestled in the heart of the English countryside, Chrestomanci Castle’s history...

vocabulary.definition: A large, impressive building serving as the official residence of a monarch or high-ranking dignitary.
vocabulary.example: The bright new part, more like a palace or a mansion...

vocabulary.definition: A five-pointed star figure often used as a symbol in various cultural and occult contexts.
vocabulary.example: An airy entrance hall with a pentagram installed in the tiled floor.

vocabulary.definition: To crush or squeeze something into a compacted shape; in this context, to stop suddenly with effort or noise.
vocabulary.example: ...before scrunching to a halt on the gravel outside one of the castle’s entrances.

vocabulary.definition: Something that is seen or worth seeing.
vocabulary.example: The most magnificent sight in the entrance hall...

vocabulary.definition: A carved or cast figure of a person or animal, especially one that is life-size or larger.
vocabulary.example: Several doorways topped with statues lead off from the hall.

vocabulary.definition: Having small towers (turrets) projecting from the walls, typically on castles or fortresses.
vocabulary.example: Part of it is gray and turreted and every bit the medieval-style fortress you might imagine...
